channel.title: NPR Topics: Home Page Top Stories
channel.description: Top stories in the U.S. and world news, politics, health, science, business, music, arts and culture. Nonprofit journalism with a mission. This is NPR.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

image.title: NPR Topics: Home Page Top Stories

item.title: Golden Tempo takes the Kentucky Derby as Cherie DeVaux becomes the 1st woman to train its winner
item.description: Golden Tempo has won the Kentucky Derby at odds of 23-1 to make Cherie DeVaux the first woman to train the winner of the opening leg of the Triple Crown.
item.content:encoded:
Golden Tempo has won the Kentucky Derby at odds of 23-1 to make Cherie DeVaux the first woman to train the winner of the opening leg of the Triple Crown.

(Image credit: Jeff Roberson)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Iran submits 14-point response to U.S. proposal to end war
item.description: Iran has presented a 14-point response to the U.S. proposal to end the war, according to Iranian state media.
item.content:encoded:
Iran has presented a 14-point response to the U.S. proposal to end the war, according to Iranian state media.

(Image credit: Vahid Salemi)
item.dc:creator: NPR Staff

item.title: Timmy the stranded whale rescued after weekslong effort
item.description: Timmy captured the hearts of whale lovers across the globe who rooted for a happy ending for the humpback.
item.content:encoded:
Timmy captured the hearts of whale lovers across the globe who rooted for a happy ending for the humpback.

(Image credit: Sebastian Peters)
item.dc:creator: Alana Wise

item.title: Academy announces major overhaul to rules
item.description: The new rules focus on areas such as AI protections for writers and actors and expanded eligibility for international films.
item.content:encoded:
The new rules focus on areas such as AI protections for writers and actors and expanded eligibility for international films.

(Image credit: Frederic J. Brown)
item.dc:creator: Chloe Veltman

item.title: Taiwan's Lai lands in Eswatini in a trip delayed by lack of overflight clearance
item.description: Eswatini remains the only African nation without tariff-free access to China's market due to its ties with Taiwan.
item.content:encoded:
Eswatini remains the only African nation without tariff-free access to China's market due to its ties with Taiwan.

(Image credit: ChiangYing-ying)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Banksy confirms new statue installed in central London is his work
item.description: The statue in Waterloo Place, which appeared early Wednesday, depicts a man proudly hoisting a flag— but the flag is blinding him.
item.content:encoded:
The statue in Waterloo Place, which appeared early Wednesday, depicts a man proudly hoisting a flag— but the flag is blinding him.

(Image credit: Kin Cheung)
item.dc:creator: Anastasia Tsioulcas

item.title: Imprisoned Iranian Nobel Peace Prize winner in critical condition
item.description: Narges Mohammadi, an Iranian activist and 2023 Nobel Peace Prize laureate, was hospitalized after collapsing in prison. Her family says her condition has deteriorated since a March heart attack.
item.content:encoded:
Narges Mohammadi, an Iranian activist and 2023 Nobel Peace Prize laureate, was hospitalized after collapsing in prison. Her family says her condition has deteriorated since a March heart attack.

(Image credit: Rune Hellestad)
item.dc:creator: Anastasia Tsioulcas

item.title: Opinion: The everyday tragedy of gun violence
item.description: The White House Correspondents Association Dinner was one of several incidents of gun violence in the U.S. last week. Others ended in injuries and fatalities.
item.content:encoded:
The White House Correspondents Association Dinner was one of several incidents of gun violence in the U.S. last week. Others ended in injuries and fatalities.

(Image credit: ROBERTO SCHMIDT/AFP via Getty Images)
item.dc:creator: Scott Simon

item.title: On "SANGÚ," Arturo Sandoval reaches back and pays it forward
item.description: For more than 60 years, this maestro of magic has collaborated with towering figures. Now on a new record, he turns to family.
item.content:encoded:
For more than 60 years, this maestro of magic has collaborated with towering figures. Now on a new record, he turns to family.

(Image credit: Joseph Gray)
item.dc:creator: Ryan Benk

item.title: Can Trump's latest pick for surgeon general make it through confirmation?
item.description: Nicole Saphier, a breast cancer radiologist, is the president's third nominee for surgeon general. Will she get confirmed?
item.content:encoded:
Nicole Saphier, a breast cancer radiologist, is the president's third nominee for surgeon general. Will she get confirmed?

(Image credit: Theo Wargo)
item.dc:creator: Pien Huang
